title: Pocket Author Shell
concept: A mobile-first compact Playground shell for Blueprint authors, using bottom navigation on narrow screens and a left rail on desktop while keeping launch, save, run, and manager consequences in stacked task panels.
flows: Choose a Blueprint URL, see import-over-current-site consequences, run progress, then save the resulting Playground
Save a temporary Playground either in browser storage or to a local directory with separate destination copy and file progress
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with rename, delete, open, import zip, export to GitHub, and download zip outcomes
Start from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, zip import, or Blueprint gallery entries
Use Site Manager settings, file browser, Blueprint bundle, database, logs, Homepage, WP Admin, path navigation, reset, reload, and export actions
featureCoverage: Import zip trigger and import-over-current-site result
Blueprint gallery with category filters and search
Selected Blueprint detail with run and inspect actions
Featured blueprint shortcuts and dense catalog entries
Destructive reset and saved reload behavior
File browser with new file, new folder, upload, browse, and code editor
Blueprint file browser, copy link, download bundle, run, and code editor
Database driver, path, size, download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
